markschemeHtml:
1. smoking/tobacco;
  2. passive smoking;
  3. Radon/other radiation;
  4. exposure to arsenic/asbestos/smoke from coal burning/fires/silica/rock dust/vehicle exhaust fumes/nitrogen oxides;

meta.title: State one cause of lung cancer.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.17. Differences between tumours in rates of cell division and growth and in the capacity for metastasis and invasion of neighbouring tissue
